name: Shenzhen JPT Opto-Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen JPT Opto-Electronics Co., Ltd. is a China-based company specializing in the research, development, production, and sales of fiber lasers, optical components, and related laser equipment. Their products are used in various industrial applications, including laser marking, cutting, welding, and cleaning, contributing to advancements in manufacturing processes. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
